subcodes.title: Words to Miss Barney, spoken around 1900-10-19
subcodes.first_line: Grace and welcome unto you. I wish you not the temporal strength of the passing body... Your faith comes like rain; the first drops are far between
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @second birth, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @living waters; water of life, @spirit of faith [ruh-i-'iman]
